title: octarrhena trigona
intro: Octarrhena trigona, also known as the three-angled orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat conditions such as fever, headache, and sore throat. The health benefits of Octarrhena trigona include its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which may help to reduce swelling and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Octarrhena trigona can be made into a decoction or infusion, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
